CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Direct_Children__c + Parent.Parent.Parent.Direct_Children__c + Parent.Parent.Direct_Children__c + Parent.Direct_Children__c + Direct_Children__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Parent.Parent.Direct_Children__c + Parent.Parent.Direct_Children__c + Parent.Direct_Children__c + Direct_Children__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Parent.Direct_Children__c + Parent.Direct_Children__c + Direct_Children__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.ParentId)), Parent.Direct_Children__c + Direct_Children__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(ParentId)),Direct_Children__c, NULL ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Total Global Locations (F)
